title: Cuneiform Tablet #0360: Old Assyrian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
